name: Grand Canyon Education, Inc.
summary: Grand Canyon Education, Inc. (GCE) is a publicly traded education services company providing technology, marketing, and operational support to colleges and universities. Its primary partner is Grand Canyon University (GCU), a non-profit Arizona university. GCE serves 20 university partners across the U.S., supporting over 136,200 students. Services include a proprietary LMS (Halo), AI tools (Mosaic platform), admissions, financial aid processing, curriculum development, and off-campus healthcare classroom and laboratory sites.
